name: caec-stale-in-progress-issue
description: overstory-caec dispatched as in_progress to a fresh lead, but the work (claudeHeadlessByDefault default flip + docs sweep) had already shipped in commits a55fce3 + 232d594 and was merged into main before the dispatch. Lead verified by checking git log for the issue ID, confirmed all 4 scope items (init.ts:822 writes the field, templates/CLAUDE.md.tmpl rewritten, CHANGELOG entry rolled into 0.10.3, init.test.ts:362 covers smoke test), and closed without spawning a builder. Pattern: when dispatched a task, search git log for the issue ID first — issues can persist as in_progress past the merge that completed them.

name: lead-compressed-mode-max-agents-2
description: Compressed-mode lead workflow under MAX AGENTS=2 dispatch override: (1) verify task with sd show, (2) read cited code lines to confirm the bug, (3) write a precise spec via 'ov spec write' since direct lead writes are blocked, (4) spawn one builder with absolute spec path (spec lives in canonical repo, not worktree, so pass abs path), (5) dispatch mail summarizing fix + file scope, (6) wait for worker_done via background poll loop, (7) self-verify by reading git diff main..HEAD and running targeted bun test + typecheck + biome on changed files in the builder worktree, (8) send merge_ready. Skipping reviewer is correct under the override; the 'NO reviewer sessions found' warning from ov mail send --type merge_ready is informational and expected.

name: lead-v2-redispatch-already-complete
description: Lead v2 re-dispatch when prior pair already shipped: verify seeds status + builder branch, re-send merge_ready pointing at existing branch, refuse to spawn duplicate builder, send worker_done. Prevents diff fork and wasted MAX AGENTS budget.
